Wolf.notes: Pack: gains +1 damage for each OTHER living Wolf its side controls. Mobile harasser; weak alone, dangerous in numbers.

Bear.notes: Bulwark: high HP living wall that threatens every adjacent enemy. Slow. Emerges from Forest old growth.

Boar.notes: Charge: a straight-line move into an enemy deals damage and pushes 1 tile. Fast line-breaker from grass/bramble.

Crows.notes: Flying: ignores terrain and line-of-sight blocking. Scout: reveals hidden effects/buffs on enemies in sight — echoes Hess's ally ability and her crow.
